extension.description:
The Harmonised Index of Consumer Prices (HICP) measures price changes of various consumer goods and services over time (inflation).  

The ‘first released’ dataset stores the original HICP data as released on the official publication dates (non-revised). It includes the full set of indices and monthly and annual rates of change for all geographical entities (aggregates and countries). This dataset is compiled according to the European Classification of Individual Consumption According to Purpose (ECOICOP) ver. 2, available in base years 2025=100 and 2015=100.

As a result of a technical error, the “first released data” dataset [prc_hicp_fpd] for January 2026 published on 25 February 2026 was updated on 3 March 2026.

The “first released data” published on 25 February 2026 are available here
